name: frGwBypassStatic
title: frGwBypassStatic
syntax: long frGwBypassStatic (long bypass, long channel, long slotId, long baseCycle, long cycleRepetition); // form 1
description: Activates/deactivates the automatic routing for the given slot. The function can be used during measurement.
Form 2 can only be used FlexRay with dual channel gateway (AB-AB-Gateway) mode, see FlexRay gateway.
